datapacks.name: Purple House
datapacks.notes: Project-owned rare overworld structure datapack. Adds a purple modern survival mansion with basement, upper terrace farms, courtyard pool, flower landscaping, and vanilla-safe interiors styled for the Pummelchen furniture/resource-pack set. Random-spread spacing is 108 chunks, about 2.986 square kilometers per placement cell.
datapacks.notes_1: Inspired by the referenced Ultimate Survival House tutorial frame: broad twin staircases, raised decks, multi-floor central gable, courtyard pool, side utility wings, and railings.
datapacks.notes_2: Uses vanilla block IDs so server generation stays stable; players can upgrade interiors with active Pummelchen furniture mods after generation.
